title: PreviewResult
description: Machine-readable output of `bin/preview.sh --json`. Combines the post-skip ActionPlan, a derived summary, the canonical plan SHA-256 (used for bootstrap.sh's --plan-sha256 binding), and the list of paths that --skip removed from the original plan. The same schema covers the `--decision no` decline path: `declined` is a discriminator field that flips `plan` and `summary` to null. Tooling should branch on `declined` before reading them.

declined.description: True when the operator declined the plan via --decision no. False on the happy path. Discriminator for the plan / summary nullability below.

plan.description: Full ActionPlan (post-skip) on the happy path; null on the decline path.

summary.description: Computed counts on the happy path; null on the decline path.

actions.description: Per-action histogram. Keys are the four ActionPlan action enums; values are non-negative counts.

plan_sha256.description: Hex SHA-256 of the canonicalised post-skip plan (jq -Sc). Empty string on the decline path AND when neither shasum nor sha256sum is on PATH (in that case the integrity binding is disabled and bootstrap refuses without --plan-sha256).

skips_applied.description: Paths the caller passed via --skip and that matched a write in the original plan. Order preserved as given on the command line. Always [] on the decline path.
